Featured at the 2025 Innovative Housing Showcase in Washington, D.C.
Cavco Anthem Duplex Series
Looking for a separate-but-close living space for a family member or considering a smart rental investment? The Cavco Anthem Duplex Series offers two separate living spaces in one innovative multi-family home — making them perfect for keeping loved ones nearby or for generating rental income. It's also the first HUD-approved manufactured duplex series available nationwide.
See the Anthem Duplex Series
Cavco — a Great American Success Story 60 Years in the Making.
Learn About Our Journey to Become the Leader in the Manufactured Housing Industry!
Homes Near YouHere's How It WorksPartnership Info
Four Cavco Home Centers Open in Nevada
Wondering where to buy a manufactured home in Nevada? You’re in luck, because Cavco has four convenient home store locations throughout vibrant Nevada.
Discover your dream home with Cavco’s manufactured home stores in Pahrump, Reno, Silver Springs and Winnemucca. Whether you’re a first-time homebuyer or looking to upgrade, we have the perfect manufactured home for you.
"Visiting [the building center] the other day was truly eye-opening and gave us a profound appreciation for the tireless efforts you all make to build homes, for which we are forever indebted and grateful. So, here’s a heartfelt Thanks!! Grab yourself a cup of coffee, a pack of pretzels and a cookie!"
— The Wilsons, Austin, Texas 
"I would highly recommend your services to anyone that wants to purchase either a manufactured or modular home. I went to several other companies and all of them were so in your face and never listened to my wants and needs, but you did. Thank You for going that extra mile."
— Marilyn Bolourtchi, St. Augustine, Florida
"Thank you for our home! We were 21 miles from the eye of Hurricane Helene, and it was very scary with 140-160mph winds. When the storm passed, we had zero damage. This is one strong, quality-built home!"
— Mr. & Mrs. Gordon, Brooksville, Florida 
"My husband is a General Contractor and built the last 3 houses we lived in. When we purchased our property in 2003, we decided to get a Palm Harbor home to put on our land so we could live in a home while we built a new house here in Florida. We were incredibly busy for the first year or two and had not started to build our new house."
— Laurie F., Plant City, Florida
"We could not have asked for a better salesperson to help us on our journey. You were always very prompt in getting back to us on the many calls and visits and calling our attention to things we may not have thought of or had not noticed. Thank you for keeping us up to date on every aspect of our new home."
— The Gunns, Winter Garden, Florida
"We are extremely happy with our experience at Palm Harbor in Odessa, Texas! We had been looking around for a home since April and going to different places. But once we met with Lethy we knew."
— Judy V., Odessa, TexasPreviousNext
1/8
Building Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) in the Southwest
Cavco Manufacturing is the leading builder of ADUs in the Southwestern United States! Their small but cozy footprint makes them a perfect backyard addition for aging parents and adult children, or as a private guest house. Cavco's off-site construction means each ADU is built faster and is more budget friendly.
Explore the floor plans of this unique series below:

We use cookies to offer you a better, more personalized browsing experience. By using this website, you are giving your consent for us to use cookies.
Read our Privacy Policy. Do Not Sell My Personal Information Accept All Cookies
Privacy Preference Center
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
